series_metadata.series_description: All USDA Child Nutrition Program sponsors must complete a sponsor application with supporting documents. Supporting documents include but are not limited to: sponsor access form, demonstrations of financial viability, budgets, vending agreements, menus and menu certification, inspections and operating licenses, enrollment data, training documentation, and federal taxation documentation.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain sponsor applications for three years plus the current year. If an agency is terminated for cause, retain until removed from the National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or until any outstanding debt is paid to USDA; if an appeal is filed then transfer to appeal file. ; Electronic: Retain sponsor applications for three years plus the current year. If an agency is terminated for cause, retain until removed from the National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or until any outstanding debt is paid to USDA; if an appeal is filed then transfer to appeal file., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
